name: helm-chart-best-practices
description: Review and generate Helm charts following the official Helm Chart Best Practices Guide (https://helm.sh/docs/chart_best_practices/).

interface.shortDescription: Review and generate best-practice Helm charts
interface.longDescription: Review, generate, and refactor Helm charts against the official Helm Chart Best Practices Guide, with focused checks for values, templates, labels, pod settings, CRDs, dependencies, and RBAC.
defaultPrompt: Review this Helm chart for best-practice issues and suggest concrete fixes.
